is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of P. falciparum Pfcrt haplotypes: 'The cross-sectional screening of the Pfcrt-haplotypes was done on P. falciparum slide positive samples.'

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfcrt codons 72-76 including K76T mutation and haplotypes CVIET, SVMNT, CVMNK.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 1 gives n and % for haplotypes (CVIET 59, 67.8%; total 87), and 100% K76T mutation.

sub_country_location.evidence: Samples collected in Luang Namtha Province, Laos — a sub-national admin unit.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Samples collected during a therapeutic efficacy study from September 2003 to January 2004 — within 3 years.

african_field_samples.evidence: Samples were collected in Luang Namtha Province, Laos (Southeast Asia), not an African country.

is_primary_study.evidence: Cross-sectional survey of 88 Laotian field samples — primary empirical study.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Samples derive from a drug efficacy study by Stohrer et al. 2004 in Luang Namtha; 88 of 108 samples were a subset of that trial cohort.

supplement.evidence: All frequency data are in Table 1 of the main text; no supplementary materials referenced.

assessment.summary: Cross-sectional study of Pfcrt haplotypes (c72-76, including K76T) in 87-88 P. falciparum field samples from Luang Namtha Province, Laos, collected Sept 2003-Jan 2004. Although it reports extractable per-locus frequencies at sub-national resolution within a 3-year window, the samples were collected in Laos (Southeast Asia), not an African country.
exclusion_reasons: Samples are from Laos (Southeast Asia), not an African country — fails the African field samples criterion.
